case_title: EAH VS. CHRIS BENTE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT AGREEMENT/ THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAH
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENTE, CHRIS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.93 FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAH
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAH SERVED DEC-18-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENTE, CHRIS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENTE, CHRIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 750 FONT BOULEVARD, #01-418-A2-02 AKA 750 FONT BOULEVARD, #418-A2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAH AS TO DEFENDANT BENTE, CHRIS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BENTE, CHRIS
